creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-30 18:43:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/dnsreflector     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    dns/dnsreflector/files dnsreflector.in patch-Makefile 
                           patch-dnsreflector.c 
  Log:
  The dnsreflector daemon listens for DNS queries on a local UDP port
  and answers with records pointing back to localhost. Combined with
  packet filter pf(4) this works as a bandwidth efficient spamtrap.
  
  WWW: http://www.wolfermann.org/dnsreflector.html
  
  PR:             ports/135077
  Submitted by:   ismail.yenigul at endersys.com.tr
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.106     +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/dns/dnsreflector/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/dns/dnsreflector/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/dns/dnsreflector/files/dnsreflector.in (new)
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/dns/dnsreflector/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/dns/dnsreflector/files/patch-dnsreflector.c (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/dns/dnsreflector/pkg-descr (new)
